metadata.description: Marketplace making all LimaCharlie plugins available.

plugins.name: lc-fundamentals
plugins.description: LimaCharlie platform concept map and deep fundamentals — orients LLMs to core concepts, event model, routing object, behavioral detection patterns, stateful rules, suppression, output streams, FIM, event collection, and common gotchas.

plugins.name: lc-essentials
plugins.description: Core LimaCharlie skills for CLI-based API access, detection engineering, sensor tasking, case investigation, and fleet health monitoring.

plugins.name: lc-advanced-skills
plugins.description: Advanced LimaCharlie skills for MSSP reporting, fleet coverage, threat intelligence, adapter management, IaC, onboarding, and HTML dashboards. Requires lc-essentials plugin.

plugins.name: lc-compliance
plugins.description: Interactive compliance skills for LimaCharlie: control-to-capability lookups, ad-hoc gap analysis, and guided agent deployment across CMMC, NIST 800-53, PCI DSS, HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 27001, and CIS v8. Bundles framework reference docs and case-reviewer agent manifests.
